The '''motivational programming capsule''' was a component in [[Lobot/Legends|Lobot's]] [[Cybernetics/Legends|cybernetic]] headband. This device gave him the "motivation" to carry out administrative tasks. It was sabotaged during an [[Ugnaught/Legends|Ugnaught]] insurrection, and he was forced to track [[EV-9D9/Legends|EV-9D9]] for once damaging [[Cloud City/Legends|Cloud City]]. He tracked the [[Droid/Legends|droid]] to [[Jabba's Palace/Legends|Jabba's Palace]], where he was captured. [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] planned to feed him to his [[Jabba's rancor/Legends|rancor]], but he managed to escape with the help of [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]].
